abstract: This paper examines ChatGPT, a sophisticated natural language processing (NLP) framework developed by OpenAI, providing a comprehensive overview of its core features, advantages, and inherent limitations. Through an analysis of its underlying architecture and diverse potential applications, this study explores the system’s capacity to facilitate seamless human-machine interaction. While the findings characterize ChatGPT as a transformative tool capable of generating remarkably coherent and context-aware dialogue, the paper also identifies significant technical and ethical challenges that must be navigated as the technology evolves. Finally, we conclude that while ChatGPT represents a major milestone in NLP, its long-term utility depends on addressing these critical constraints.
